title: Japanese Yuzu-Glazed Chicken Skewers
description: Grilled chicken skewers smothered in a zesty yuzu glaze, perfect for a quick and flavorful dinner.

ingredients.name: yuzu juice
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a mix of equal parts lemon and grapefruit juice

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: or substitute with tamari or gluten-free soy sauce

ingredients.name: rice vinegar
ingredients.notes: or substitute with apple cider vinegar

instructions: In a small saucepan, combine yuzu juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Thread chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the yuzu glaze onto the chicken, making sure to coat all surfaces.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped green onions.
Serve immediately, with additional yuzu glaze on the side for serving.
